signals.trend: K-beauty's TikTok Shop takeover: medicube holds US #1
signals.why: FastMoss Q2 rankings show APR's medicube holding three of the top-ten US TikTok Shop SKUs including #1, with June its strongest month — a direct, accelerating read-through to APR's fastest-growing market.
signals.evidence: The #1 best-selling product on TikTok Shop US in Q2 2026 was medicube's PDRN Pink Collagen Volume Multi Balm at $16.99M — accelerating to $6.85M in June alone.

sources.name: FastMoss
sources.title: TikTok Shop US Q2 2026 Best Sellers: Top 10 by Revenue

sources.name: Global Cosmetics News
sources.title: Medicube Maker APR Becomes K-Beauty Powerhouse

signals.why: MP Materials' escalating trade-secrets lawsuit plus Russell value-index removal hit the only other US mine-to-magnet aspirant racing the DoD's Jan 2027 deadline — a legal chokepoint on the chokepoint.
signals.evidence: Shares slumped 23% in June and another 7.3% after index removal and MP lawsuit escalation, even as USAR commissions its Wheat Ridge hydromet demo and builds the Cherokee County magnet plant (~490 jobs).
